description: Explanations of non-cash mustering-out benefits gained when leaving a career.

rank_bonuses.5-6: 3 bonus benefit rolls, and DM+1 to all Benefit rolls in this career

rules.gambler_bonus: A Traveller with the Gambler skill gains DM+1 to all rolls on Cash columns.

benefits.Armour: Select any type of armour with a limit of Cr10000 and TL 12. If rolled again, choose different armour or trade up (limit Cr25000).
benefits.Blade: Select any blade weapon (Cr1000 / TL 12). If rolled again, take another blade or a level of Melee (blades).
benefits.Characteristic Increases: Increase the listed characteristic, up to racial maximum (15 for humans). Excess SOC becomes Ship Shares.
benefits.Combat Implant: Gain any augmentation (Cr50000 / TL 12). If rolled again, take a different one or increase existing.
benefits.Free Trader: Receive a Free Trader with 25% mortgage paid. Roll 1D times on Spacecraft Quirks. Rolling 4 times clears the mortgage.
benefits.Gun: Select any common or military ranged weapon (Cr1000 / TL 12). Repeat rolls: another weapon or a level of Gun Combat.
benefits.INT +1: Increase INT by 1 (up to racial maximum).
benefits.EDU +1: Increase EDU by 1 (up to racial maximum).
benefits.SOC +1: Increase SOC by 1. If at or above racial max, excess becomes a Ship Share.
benefits.STR +1: Increase STR by 1 (up to racial maximum).
benefits.DEX +1: Increase DEX by 1 (up to racial maximum).
benefits.END +1: Increase END by 1 (up to racial maximum).
benefits.Lab Ship: Receive a Lab Ship with 25% mortgage paid. Roll 1D times on Old Ships. Four rolls clears mortgage.
benefits.Personal Vehicle: Personal ground car or air/raft (limit Cr300000 / TL 10). Repeat: another or a level of Drive/Flyer.
benefits.Scientific Equipment: Any one piece of scientific equipment (Cr2000 / TL 12). Repeat: more equipment or a level of Electronics/Science.
benefits.Scout Ship: Receive a Scout Ship (still belongs to the Scout Service — expect recall missions). Repeat rolls re-roll.
benefits.Ship's Boat: Small craft (MCr10 / TL 12). Repeat: Pilot (small craft).
benefits.Ship Share: One ship share worth MCr1 (cannot be redeemed for cash).
benefits.TAS Membership: Traveller's Aid Society membership — lifetime, non-transferable, grants a high passage every two months. Second roll: gain 2 ship shares instead.
benefits.Two Ship Shares: Two ship shares (MCr1 each, not redeemable for cash).
benefits.Weapon: Select any weapon (Cr1000 / TL 12). Repeat: another weapon or a level of appropriate weapon skill.
benefits.Yacht: Receive a Yacht with 25% mortgage paid. Roll 1D times on Old Ships. Four rolls clears mortgage.
